name: remotion-annotate
description: Click-to-edit visual overlay for Remotion Studio. Select any element in the preview, tweak props/text visually, annotate for your AI agent, and edit the source directly.
author: Alan Lucena

scripts.check: node --check src/index.mjs && node --check src/bridge.mjs && node --check src/ast.mjs && node --check src/overlay.js && node --check src/studio-hooks.js && echo ok
